question: 予約コード BK-2026-000123 の詳細を教えてください
sqlQuery:
SELECT TOP (1)
    booking_id,
    booking_code,
    plan_name,
    product_type,
    destination_country,
    destination_region,
    destination_city,
    season,
    departure_date,
    return_date,
    duration_days,
    pax,
    total_revenue_jpy,
    booking_status,
    booking_date
FROM dbo.booking
WHERE booking_code = 'BK-2026-000123';

question: 顧客コード C-2025-000456 の登録情報を確認したい
sqlQuery:
SELECT TOP (1)
    customer_id,
    customer_code,
    age_band,
    gender,
    customer_segment,
    loyalty_tier,
    acquisition_channel,
    prefecture,
    email_opt_in
FROM dbo.customer
WHERE customer_code = 'C-2025-000456';

question: キャンペーンコード CMP-2026-Q1-007 の概要が知りたい
sqlQuery:
SELECT TOP (1)
    campaign_id,
    campaign_code,
    campaign_name,
    campaign_type,
    target_segment,
    target_destination_type,
    start_date,
    end_date,
    discount_percent,
    total_budget_jpy,
    total_redemptions
FROM dbo.campaign
WHERE campaign_code = 'CMP-2026-Q1-007';

question: 決済 ID 9e2f4a6b-9abc-4def-9012-000000000003 の決済明細を見たい
sqlQuery:
-- 決済 ID は payment テーブルの payment_id (UUID) で検索。
SELECT TOP (1)
    payment_id,
    booking_id,
    payment_method,
    payment_status,
    amount_jpy,
    currency,
    exchange_rate_to_jpy,
    paid_at,
    installment_count
FROM dbo.payment
WHERE payment_id = '9e2f4a6b-9abc-4def-9012-000000000003';

question: レビュー ID 7c0d2e4f-5678-4abc-9def-000000000002 の元データを確認したい
sqlQuery:
SELECT TOP (1)
    review_id,
    booking_id,
    customer_id,
    plan_name,
    destination_region,
    rating,
    nps,
    sentiment,
    review_date
FROM dbo.tour_review
WHERE review_id = '7c0d2e4f-5678-4abc-9def-000000000002';

question: 直近に登録された予約 10 件のヘッドラインを見せて
sqlQuery:
SELECT TOP (10)
    booking_code,
    plan_name,
    destination_region,
    season,
    departure_date,
    pax,
    total_revenue_jpy,
    booking_status,
    booking_date
FROM dbo.booking
ORDER BY booking_date DESC, booking_id DESC;

question: 最新のキャンセル 10 件を時系列で確認したい
sqlQuery:
SELECT TOP (10)
    c.booking_id,
    b.booking_code,
    b.plan_name,
    b.destination_region,
    c.cancelled_at,
    c.cancellation_reason,
    c.cancellation_lead_days,
    c.refund_amount_jpy
FROM dbo.cancellation AS c
JOIN dbo.booking AS b ON b.booking_id = c.booking_id
ORDER BY c.cancelled_at DESC, c.booking_id DESC;

question: 最近の決済 10 件を新しい順に表示して
sqlQuery:
SELECT TOP (10)
    p.payment_id,
    p.booking_id,
    b.booking_code,
    p.payment_method,
    p.payment_status,
    p.amount_jpy,
    p.currency,
    p.exchange_rate_to_jpy,
    p.paid_at
FROM dbo.payment AS p
JOIN dbo.booking AS b ON b.booking_id = p.booking_id
ORDER BY p.paid_at DESC, p.payment_id DESC;

question: 直近のお問い合わせ 10 件を新しい順に見せて
sqlQuery:
SELECT TOP (10)
    inquiry_id,
    customer_id,
    channel,
    inquiry_type,
    subject,
    received_at,
    resolved_at,
    resolution_minutes,
    csat,
    assigned_team
FROM dbo.inquiry
ORDER BY received_at DESC, inquiry_id DESC;

question: 最新のレビュー 10 件を時系列で確認したい
sqlQuery:
SELECT TOP (10)
    review_id,
    booking_id,
    plan_name,
    destination_region,
    rating,
    nps,
    sentiment,
    review_date
FROM dbo.tour_review
ORDER BY review_date DESC, review_id DESC;

question: 「沖縄」と「ファミリー」を含むプラン名の予約はそもそも存在しますか
顧客コード C-2025-000456 の予約は何件登録されていますか
sqlQuery:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS booking_count
FROM dbo.booking AS b
JOIN dbo.customer AS c ON c.customer_id = b.customer_id
WHERE c.customer_code = 'C-2025-000456';

question: 予約コード BK-2026-000123 はすでに支払い完了していますか
sqlQuery:
-- yes/no 質問は EXISTS で 1 (完了) / 0 (未完了) を返す。複数回決済 (split / installment) でも結果は 0/1 に正規化される。
SELECT CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM dbo.payment AS p
        JOIN dbo.booking AS b ON b.booking_id = p.booking_id
        WHERE b.booking_code = 'BK-2026-000123'
          AND p.payment_status = 'succeeded'
    ) THEN 1
    ELSE 0
END AS is_paid;

question: 顧客コード C-2025-000456 の予約履歴を直近順に見せて
sqlQuery:
SELECT TOP (10)
    b.booking_code,
    b.plan_name,
    b.destination_region,
    b.season,
    b.departure_date,
    b.booking_date,
    b.pax,
    b.total_revenue_jpy,
    b.booking_status
FROM dbo.booking AS b
JOIN dbo.customer AS c ON c.customer_id = b.customer_id
WHERE c.customer_code = 'C-2025-000456'
ORDER BY b.booking_date DESC, b.booking_id DESC;

question: 予約コード BK-2026-000123 の旅程明細を一覧で出して
sqlQuery:
SELECT
    i.itinerary_item_id,
    i.item_type,
    i.item_name,
    i.start_date,
    i.end_date,
    i.nights,
    i.unit_price_jpy,
    i.quantity,
    i.total_price_jpy
FROM dbo.itinerary_item AS i
JOIN dbo.booking AS b ON b.booking_id = i.booking_id
WHERE b.booking_code = 'BK-2026-000123'
ORDER BY i.start_date, i.itinerary_item_id;
